title: Delhi court sends 2 CBI officers to 3 months jail for illegal raid on IRS officer 26 years ago
description: A Delhi court on Tuesday sentenced two Central Bureau of Investigation (CBI) officials to three months in jail for criminal trespass, assault and mischief during an illegal raid and arrest of an Indian Revenue Service (IRS) officer 26 years ago.Judicial Magistrate First Class (JMFC) Shashank Nandan Bhatt of the Tis Hazari Courts passed the order.A detailed judgement is awaited.Notably, the Court had earlier ruled that the CBI officers conducted the raid with  a “malafide intent” and ex
